name: Applesauce-Spice Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Mix brown sugar, shortening, coffee, applesauce, and eggs in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Gradually stir in the remaining ingredients (flour mixture) until just incorporated. The dough will be very soft.
4. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of the dough about 2 inches apart onto a lightly greased cookie sheet.
5. Bake for about 7 minutes, or until almost no indentation remains when touched.
This recipe makes about 7 dozen drops.
